title: Chapter analysis pipeline: Chs 1 (Feklyunina) + 2 (Morozov)
public_claim: This is a reusable chapter-analysis pipeline applied to the first two chapters of the Routledge Handbook of Russian Foreign Policy.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.
use_value: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
